nasb.text: “What do you mean by using this proverb concerning the land of Israel, saying, ‘The fathers eat the sour grapes, But the children’s teeth are set on edge’?

esv.text: “What do you mean by repeating this proverb concerning the land of Israel, ‘The fathers have eaten sour grapes, and the children’s teeth are set on edge’?

cnv.text: “論到以色列地，你們為甚麼引用這俗語說‘父親吃了酸葡萄，兒子的牙酸倒了’呢？

ccb.text: “你们以色列人为什么说‘父亲吃了酸葡萄，儿子的牙酸倒了’这句俗语呢？
